subcodes.first_line: In this hour the Tongue of the Beloved declareth: Gird ye fast the loins of service, and in all times [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این وقت لسان محبوب میفرماید کمر خدمت محکم به بندید و در تمام اوقات و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
